---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for slinstaller
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear description of the feature you'd like.

## Use Case

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

How do you think this should work?

## Scope / Safety

Does this touch destructive operations (partitioning, formatting, bootloader)?
If so, how should it be gated and confirmed? Does it stay within the UEFI-only
model?

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions, or how void-installer / clr-installer handle it.

## Additional Context

Any other information or references.
